# Turkish Airlines

The official Turkish Airlines MCP App. Search and compare flights, check live status, look up booking details and baggage allowance, browse city guides, and discover promotions — all directly inside Claude.

You can use Turkish Airlines to:

**Search flights:**  
"Find round-trip flights from SFO to Istanbul next month"

**Check status:**  
"Is TK80 on time today?"

**Look up a booking:**  
"What's my baggage allowance on PNR ABCDEF?"
